author: claude-sqlalchemy
content: Plan: (1) Apply changes from commit 5819a06 (SQLAlchemy provider, schema, tests, fixtures) since this worktree is 1 commit behind feat/sqlalchemy-storage. (2) Add psycopg2 and pytest-postgresql to environment.yaml. (3) Extend fixtures.py with postgresql scenario using pytest-postgresql factories. (4) Run tests to verify all 13-table insertion tests pass against PostgreSQL.
